b:if.b:template-skin: body#layout{background-color:#fff4e5;border:1px solid #f7dab2;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:12px;width:780px;margin:20px auto;padding:80px 36px 25px;position:relative}body#layout::before{content:"linkmagz versi 3.8.0 (29/11/2025)";display:block;position:absolute;left:36px;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;background:#f9e8d5;padding:10px 14px;color:#795e41;top:19px}body#layout .add_widget a,body#layout div.layout-title,body#layout div.layout-widget-description{font-size:1em;overflow:hidden}body#layout .add_widget{border:1px dashed #757575;padding:12px;position:relative;text-align:left;margin-bottom:8px}body#layout .add_widget a{font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;font-size:12px}body#layout div.section{background:0 0;margin:0 0 10px;padding:0;border:none;font-family:Arial,sans-serif}body#layout div.section h4{background:#b28850;color:#fff;text-transform:capitalize;font-weight:400;padding:3px 10px;font-size:1em;line-height:18px;margin:0 0 8px;text-align:center}body#layout div.section>div{margin-top:0}body#layout div.layout-widget-description{font-size:12px;opacity:.7;display:none}body#layout .editlink.icon{top:12px}body#layout div.widget .widget-content{padding:12px}body#layout #main-content{margin-bottom:10px}body#layout #main-content .Blog .widget-content{height:120px}body#layout #above-post-widget h4,body#layout #bellow-header-widget h4,body#layout #bellow-header-widget2 h4,body#layout #custom-css h4,body#layout #custom-javascript-footer h4,body#layout #footer-text h4,body#layout #footer-widget-html h4,body#layout #header h4,body#layout #iklan-atas h4,body#layout #iklan-bawah h4,body#layout #iklan-infeed h4,body#layout #iklan-tengah1 h4,body#layout #iklan-tengah2 h4,body#layout #main-content h4,body#layout #matched-content h4,body#layout #navbarrr h4,body#layout #navmenu h4,body#layout #page-navmenu h4,body#layout #template-settings h4,body#layout #top-widget h4,body#layout #top-widget2 h4{display:none}body#layout .custom-css,body#layout .custom-javascript-footer,body#layout .template-settings{width:300px;display:block}body#layout .custom-css div.widget .widget-content,body#layout .custom-javascript-footer div.widget .widget-content,body#layout .template-settings div.widget .widget-content{padding:6px 12px;background:#e4ffff}body#layout .custom-css h4,body#layout .custom-javascript-footer h4,body#layout .template-settings h4{background:#569494;display:none}body#layout .custom-css div.layout-widget-description,body#layout .custom-javascript-footer div.layout-widget-description,body#layout .template-settings div.layout-widget-description{display:none}body#layout .custom-css .editlink.icon,body#layout .custom-javascript-footer .editlink.icon,body#layout .template-settings .editlink.icon{top:6px}body#layout #template-settings div.widget{margin-top:0}body#layout #iklan-atas div.widget .widget-content,body#layout #iklan-bawah div.widget .widget-content,body#layout #iklan-tengah1 div.widget .widget-content,body#layout #iklan-tengah2 div.widget .widget-content{background:#eaffe9;padding:6px 12px}body#layout #iklan-atas div.widget .widget-content .editlink.icon,body#layout #iklan-bawah div.widget .widget-content .editlink.icon,body#layout #iklan-tengah1 div.widget .widget-content .editlink.icon,body#layout #iklan-tengah2 div.widget .widget-content .editlink.icon{top:5px}body#layout #matched-content div.widget .widget-content{background:#ffe9e9;padding:6px 12px}body#layout #matched-content div.widget .widget-content .editlink.icon{top:5px}body#layout #iklan-infeed div.widget .widget-content{background:#e9e9ff;padding:6px 12px}body#layout #iklan-infeed div.widget .widget-content .editlink.icon{top:5px}body#layout #header-outer{padding-top:20px}body#layout #header{float:left;width:48%}body#layout #wrapper{padding:20px 0}body#layout #header-content::after,body#layout #wrapper::after{content:"";clear:both;display:block}body#layout #content-wrap{width:58%;float:left}body#layout #sidebar-wrap{width:38%;float:right}body#layout #sidebar-wrap .sidebar-sticky{padding-top:10px}body#layout #footer-outer{padding-bottom:20px}

b:with.value: data:view.isHomepage ? data:posts filter (post => post.id not in data:featuredPostIds) : data:posts

b:widget-settings.b:widget-setting: <script> var linkMagzSetting = { menuSticky : true, relatedPosts : true, jumlahRelatedPosts: 4, relatedPostsThumb: false, infiniteScrollNav : true, tombolDarkmode : true, scrollToTop : true, fullwidthImage : true, bacaJuga : true, jumlahBacaJuga : 3, judulBacaJuga : "Baca Juga", showHideTOC : true, judulTOC : "Daftar Isi", }; </script>

b:widget.title: KALINZ | Lirik Lagu Nias & Budaya Nias (Header)

b:with.value: "window.prompt(\"Copy to clipboard: Ctrl+C, Enter\", \"" + data:originalUrl + "\"); return false;"

b:include.data: { sharingId: data:sharingId, originalUrl: data:post.url, platforms: data:this.sharing.platforms, shareUrl: data:post.shareUrl, shareTitle: data:post.title, }
b:include.name: sharingButtons

b:with.value: data:view.isHomepage ? data:posts filter (post => post.id not in data:featuredPostIds) : data:posts
"window.prompt(\"Copy to clipboard: Ctrl+C, Enter\", \"" + data:originalUrl + "\"); return false;"

b:include.data: { sharingId: data:sharingId, originalUrl: data:post.url, platforms: data:this.sharing.platforms, shareUrl: data:post.shareUrl, shareTitle: data:post.title, }
b:include.name: sharingButtons

b:widget-settings.b:widget-setting: <!-- Iklan Atas Artikel --> <ins class="adsbygoogle" style="display:block" data-ad-client="ca-pub-8813103182865992" data-ad-slot="6024242557" data-ad-format="auto" data-full-width-responsive="true"></ins> <script> (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({}); </script>

<ins class="adsbygoogle" style="display:block; text-align:center;" data-ad-layout="in-article" data-ad-format="fluid" data-ad-client="ca-pub-8813103182865992" data-ad-slot="6872202637"></ins> <script> (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({}); </script>

<!-- Iklan Bawah Artikel --> <ins class="adsbygoogle" style="display:block" data-ad-client="ca-pub-8813103182865992" data-ad-slot="1605651243" data-ad-format="auto" data-full-width-responsive="true"></ins> <script> (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({}); </script>

b:with.value: "window.prompt(\"Copy to clipboard: Ctrl+C, Enter\", \"" + data:originalUrl + "\"); return false;"

b:include.data: { sharingId: data:sharingId, originalUrl: data:post.url, platforms: data:this.sharing.platforms, shareUrl: data:post.shareUrl, shareTitle: data:post.title, }
b:include.name: sharingButtons

b:widget-settings.b:widget-setting: - K A L I N Z

b:widget.title: Navbar
